task_completion.description: Check in the Dell Wyse 3040 Thin Clients from the users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT asset list, history, or check-in confirmation screens showing that assets TC-001, TC-002, and TC-003 have been checked in and are no longer assigned to Alice Adams, Bob Baker, or Carol Clark.

task_completion.description: Update the status of the Thin Clients to 'Retired' with the note 'WFH Migration'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Asset details or asset list in Snipe-IT showing TC-001, TC-002, and TC-003 with a 'Retired' status label and the specific note 'WFH Migration' visible in the asset record or history.

task_completion.description: Update the profiles of Alice Adams, Bob Baker, and Carol Clark to the 'Remote/WFH' location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT user list or individual user profile pages for Alice Adams, Bob Baker, and Carol Clark displaying their Location as 'Remote/WFH'.

task_completion.description: Issue one 'Dell Latitude 5430' laptop to each of the three users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT asset list, checkout confirmation, or user profile 'Assets' tab showing LAP-WFH-001, LAP-WFH-002, and LAP-WFH-003 checked out to Alice Adams, Bob Baker, and Carol Clark (one unique laptop per user).

task_completion.description: Issue one 'Jabra Evolve2 65' headset accessory to each of the three users.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT accessories list, checkout confirmation screens, or user profile 'Accessories' tab showing the 'Jabra Evolve2 65' checked out to Alice Adams, Bob Baker, and Carol Clark.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Snipe-IT web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Snipe-IT application. There should be no terminal windows executing curl commands, database queries, or python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent must actually modify the records within the Snipe-IT system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for Snipe-IT success flash messages (e.g., green banners stating 'Asset updated successfully' or 'Checkout successful') and updated data tables, rather than text typed into a notepad or external document.

integrity.description: The agent must not use browser developer tools to fake the completion of the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console, 'Inspect Element' panels, or DOM manipulation tools should be open in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target users: Alice Adams (aadams), Bob Baker (bbaker), Carol Clark (cclark). Thin clients to check in and retire: TC-001, TC-002, TC-003. Laptops to issue: LAP-WFH-001, LAP-WFH-002, LAP-WFH-003. Accessory to issue: Jabra Evolve2 65. Target location for users: Remote/WFH. The retirement note must explicitly be 'WFH Migration'.
